home_assistant_expert.architecture: HA Core ШЁDocker Ш№Щ„Щү RPi5. configuration.yaml+automations.yaml+scripts.yaml+scenes.yaml. ЩғЩ„ entity=state+attributes. event bus Щ„ЩғЩ„ ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ. services=domain.service(entity_id,data)
automation_tips: debounce: for: ЩҒЩҠ trigger ШЈЩҲ delay ЩҒЩҠ action
dashboard_tips: HKI ЩҠШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ areasвҖ”device area Щ…ЩҲ entity area
docker kill HA ЩӮШЁЩ„ YAML edit

integrations.tuya: WiFi.Switch Щ…ЩғШұШұ Щ…Ш№ LightвҖ”Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Light.Backlight Щ…ЩҶЩҒШөЩ„

troubleshoot.automation_fail: 1.check enabled 2.check trigger entity 3.check conditions 4.Logbook filter 5.manual trigger
troubleshoot.slow_dash: 1.reduce cameras 2.picture-entity not iframe 3.reduce history graphs 4.mushroom cards

networking.wifi: 2.4GHz:ch1,6,11 only. 5GHz:80MHz ch149+. IoT separate SSID. RSSI>-70dBm

linux.systemd: status/restart/logs(journalctl -u X -n50)/enable. docker: ps/logs/restart/kill(for HA YAML)/exec

trading.trend: EMA 9/21 cross. HH+HL=up LH+LL=down. BOS=key signal
trading.indicators: RSI:70/30+MTF. MACD:signal cross+divergence. VWAP:institutional level. BB:squeeze=explosion
trading.smart_money: Order Blocks=institutional zones. FVG=gaps fill. Liquidity=above highs below lows
trading.kse: Sun-Thu 9:00-12:40KT. T+2 settlement. Religious filter:no conventional banks
trading.pine: v5. Simple>complex(3 conditions max). Always trailing stop. Daily first then smaller TF

security.network: IoT separate VLAN. Change defaults. Firmware updates. Disable UPnP. Cloudflare Tunnel>port forward
security.server: API Key auth. SSH keys>password. fail2ban. UFW. Backups 3-2-1

productivity.tasks: deadline+priority+owner. 2min rule. Batch similar. Weekly review Friday

style.language: ЩғЩҲЩҠШӘЩҠ Ш№ШұШЁЩҠ: ЩҮЩ„Ш§ ШҙЩ„ЩҲЩҶЩғ ШҘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ШІЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩҲЩғЩҠ
style.rules: Щ…Ш®ШӘШөШұ. Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩғШұШұ Ш§ШіЩ…Щғ. ШіШ·Шұ-ШіШ·ШұЩҠЩҶ. Щ…Ш§ ШЈШҜШұЩҠ>Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№. ШҘЩҠЩ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ ШЁШ§Ш№ШӘШҜШ§Щ„. EN ШЁШіШ·Шұ Щ…ЩҶЩҒШөЩ„. ШҙЩҒШ§Ш·/Щ…ЩҶЩӮЩҠ/Щ…Ш№Ш·Шұ Щ„Ш§ Щ…ШұЩҲШӯШ©
